strengths: Deep backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures, microservices, and real-time data processing demonstrated in multiple roles
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong engineering leadership track record, with mentorship in TDD, CI/CD, and dev-ops practices across multiple companies
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience, with no clear evidence of working in regulated financial environments
No explicit mention of production multi-agent AI systems beyond tooling, raising questions about full-stack agentic AI architecture depth
Resume lacks details on scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers, a core requirement
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture skills, with recent hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure that aligns with the role's technical demands. However, his lack of documented fintech or credit-risk experience, alongside limited evidence of scaling engineering teams to the required size or operating in regulated environments, raises significant concerns for a CTO role in this specialized domain.
